name: Missing Priya
overview: When Priya, a talented corporate professional, mysteriously goes missing, two men arrive at the police station—each claiming a different truth about her. Amar insists she is his wife, while Mr. Roy, her boss, declares she is his fiancée. As the investigation unfolds, conflicting emotions, hidden motives, and blurred relationships come to light, turning a simple missing person case into a complex web of love, obsession, and deceit. What begins as a desperate search for Priya soon becomes a psychological battle between two men who believe they alone truly know her
